hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | awk 'BEGIN{rc=0} /(^|[[:space:]|&;])(kubectl|helm|flux)([[:space:]]|$)/ { if ($0 !~ /(--context|--kube-context)[=[:space:]]*home/) { print "Refusing: kubectl/helm/flux command missing --context home. Add --context home to the command." > "/dev/stderr"; rc=2 } } END { exit rc }'

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty' | awk 'BEGIN{rc=0} /\.sops\.ya?ml$/ { f=$0; cmd="grep -c \"ENC\\[\" \"" f "\" 2>/dev/null"; cmd | getline n; close(cmd); if (n+0 == 0) { print "SOPS guard: " f " is plaintext after edit. Run: task sops:encrypt-file file=" f > "/dev/stderr"; rc=2 } } END { exit rc }'
